description: Kaggle T4×2 free-tier accelerator. Targets sm_75 (Turing). Pinned for the Apr/May 2026 stack. Note: T4 is sm_75; FlashAttention-2 needs sm_80+ and therefore is NOT cached here — install_flash_attn.py skips the install automatically on Turing. The harness's _attn_impl_for_hardware gate falls back to SDPA mem-efficient.
_note: Kaggle moved from Python 3.10 to 3.12 in mid-2026; the manifest tracks that. Adjust to the actual reported version (visible at bootstrap as 'python=cp312' in install_flash_attn.py's detection line) if Kaggle's runtime shifts again.

data_caches.name: huggingface_hub
data_caches.description: Pre-populated HF Hub cache containing Qwen3-4B-Instruct-2507, declare-lab/delta-mem_qwen3_4b-instruct, and the unsloth Qwen3.5-4B-MTP-GGUF set. Saves 5-8 minutes of model download per fresh kernel.

data_caches.name: pip_wheelhouse
data_caches.description: Optional: pre-downloaded pip wheels for requirements.txt. If present, `pip install --find-links` shaves ~60s off bootstrap.
